body: HIGH runtime.concurrency_regression: Downgrade from concurrent/atomic type to non-thread-safe implementation
HIGH runtime.thread_safety_removal: Removal of synchronization (synchronized, volatile, locks) from shared code
CRITICAL runtime.concurrency.thread_safety_downgrade: CRITICAL: Detected downgrade from ThreadSafe type to Non-ThreadSafe type (e.g., ConcurrentHashMap -> HashMap). High risk of race conditions!
HIGH runtime.concurrency.static_unsafe_collection: Usage of static non-thread-safe collection detected. This is a common cause of race conditions in multi-threaded environments.
MEDIUM runtime.performance.sleep_added: Thread.sleep() introduced. This may indicate poor concurrency handling or debug code left in production.
CRITICAL runtime.concurrency.lock_removed: CRITICAL: Removal of Lock/Synchronized detected! This is a P0 stability risk (TOP1 accident cause).
CRITICAL runtime.concurrency.volatile_removed: CRITICAL: Removal of volatile keyword detected! This causes visibility issues.
CRITICAL runtime.concurrency.final_removed: CRITICAL: Removal of final modifier detected! Immutable object might become mutable (thread-safety risk).
